For each, we cover topics like education, employment, health, and housing just to name a few.\n## get\n[## started](https://www.census.gov/data/what-is-data-census-gov.html)\nCheck out our help resources, FAQs, quick start guides, and release information\n![Image 4: Getting Started with Your Search on data.census.gov video thumbnail](https://data.census.gov/assets/bottom-card-getting-started-data-census-gov-title-card-341e2b41.png)\nGetting Started with Your Search on data.census.gov\n![Image 5: Touring the Mapping Feature on data.census.gov video thumbnail](https://data.census.gov/assets/bottom-card-touring-mapping-features-title-card-b0df1ddc.png)\nTouring the Mapping Feature on data.census.gov\n![Image 6: Exploring the Microdata Access Tool (MDAT) on data.census.gov video thumbnail](https://data.census.gov/assets/bottom-card-exploring-microdata-access-tool-title-card-ff5f9310.png)\nExploring the Microdata Access Tool", "relevance_score": 0.85}]
